## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences on *what* and *why*. The diff shows the *how*. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Test-only change
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test:unit` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test:e2e` passes (if UI changed)
- [ ] Updated `docs/` where relevant
- [ ] Updated `AGENTS.md` if I changed a canonical convention
- [ ] Justified any new dependency in `docs/tech-stack-decisions.md`
- [ ] Conventional Commit prefix in the PR title
